groups.title: Essentials
groups.description: Minimum inputs for a useful newsletter package.

groups.title: CTA & destination
groups.description: One clear action and verified link.

variables.label: Topic
variables.placeholder: How small teams ship useful content without fake hype
variables.hint: One central theme for this issue.

help.why: Keeps the issue focused on one theme instead of several disconnected ideas.
help.example: Why we publish Early Access status honestly
help.avoid: Several unrelated topics or a vague “this week’s updates” without a thread.

variables.label: Goal
variables.placeholder: educate / update / invite reply / drive one clear action
variables.hint: One primary goal for this issue.

help.why: Shapes structure, CTA, and how promotional the issue should feel.
help.example: Help readers write one clearer product update email
help.avoid: Stacking sell + event + survey + reply in one goal.

variables.label: Target audience
variables.placeholder: founders and marketers who publish product content

help.why: Language, depth, and examples should match their knowledge and goals.
help.example: Early-stage B2B founders and content leads
help.avoid: Assuming every reader is a buyer, expert, or insider.

variables.label: Newsletter type
variables.hint: Pick the type that fits the goal — structure adapts to it.

help.why: Digest, founder note, and promotional issue need different structures.
help.avoid: Forcing every issue into the same template regardless of content.

variables.label: Brand name
variables.hint: Brand or sender name for sign-off and voice.

help.why: Used in sign-off and so the voice matches who is writing.
help.avoid: Invented company names or multiple conflicting sender identities.

help.why: Keeps the issue warm and professional without corporate fluff or hype.
help.avoid: Empty motivation, aggressive sales tone, or generic AI polish.

variables.label: Language
variables.hint: Language of the full package (subjects + body).

help.why: All subject lines, preview text, and body should match this language.

variables.label: Industry
variables.hint: Niche context for examples and framing.

help.why: Helps examples and wording feel relevant to the reader’s world.
help.avoid: Jargon without explanation when the audience is mixed.

variables.label: Main message
variables.placeholder: One clear point the reader should remember after reading
variables.hint: Central idea — not a list of unrelated updates.

help.why: Gives the body a single spine from opening to CTA.
help.example: Honest Early Access messaging builds more trust than fake social proof.
help.avoid: Several competing messages or unstated claims.

variables.label: Key points
variables.placeholder:
Point 1…
Point 2…
Point 3…
(only facts you can verify)
variables.hint: Facts and takeaways to include — no invented stats or stories.

help.why: Supplies verified content so the model does not invent details.
help.example: Free: 5 generations/day UTC. Pro: 100/month. We never invent testimonials.
help.avoid: Unverified stats, fake testimonials, or product features that are not live.

variables.label: Length
variables.hint: Editorial length — not a hard platform limit.

help.why: Controls depth without padding a simple idea.
help.avoid: Making a simple update artificially long.

variables.label: Additional context
variables.placeholder: Restrictions, must-include links, things to avoid, brand rules…
variables.hint: Anything else the model must respect.

help.why: Captures constraints so the draft stays on-policy and accurate.
help.example: Do not invent customer counts. No fake urgency. No hashtags.
help.avoid: Leaving critical restrictions only in your head.

variables.label: Call to action
variables.placeholder: Try the Newsletter template / Reply with your biggest blocker
variables.hint: One primary action — not several competing CTAs.

help.why: Ends the issue with one clear, relevant next step.
help.example: Open the Newsletter template in Creatornivo
help.avoid: Stacking download + book a call + share + survey in one section.

variables.label: Link
variables.placeholder: https://www.creatornivo.com/… or leave blank for placeholder
variables.hint: Real URL only — missing links become placeholders.

help.why: Supports the CTA with a verified destination.
help.avoid: Fake URLs, untested links, or several competing destinations.
